name: The Range at Cold Springs
about: The Range at Cold Springs is a golf simulation and practice facility located in Abbeville, SC. It offers both Toptracer-equipped covered bays and a traditional grass tee area, catering to various preferences. The venue features a family-friendly atmosphere with a Clubhouse, Range Cafe, and fire pit, providing a space for both serious practice and social gatherings. Operations include leagues, lessons, event hosting, and a weekly happy hour.
why_golfers_like_it: Ten covered bays with Toptracer technology for enhanced practice and gameplay
A dedicated grass tee area for a more traditional driving range experience
Family-friendly atmosphere with a cafe and fire pit for socializing
Hosts leagues and events for community engagement
Coaching options available for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Range Cafe offers pizza and other food items. Open 10am-2pm and 5pm-10pm, closed on Sundays.
No mention of alcohol service available at the venue.

simulator_hardware.notes: Ten covered bays equipped with Toptracer technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or required, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a Range Cafe that serves food. There is no mention of BYOB or outside food policies, so it is best to enjoy the offerings on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website mentions hosting 18-hole virtual golf events, but does not specify the standard time required for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Range at Cold Springs promotes a family-friendly atmosphere, mentioning a Clubhouse, fire pit, and activities suitable for the whole family.
